summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations, merges, fix PRs, or closeouts are planned. Open non-security PRs are kept for ordinary maintainer/contributor follow-up; security-sensitive linked WhatsApp PRs are routed to central security handling only.
